name: Stickman Parkours
description: Welcome to Stickman Parkour, A new Running and jumping Game you'll face challenging levels filled with devious traps once more. Are you ready to take command of this brave stickman and show his acrobatic abilities while earning various achievements and gems? Best of luck! ACTION
instructions: Arrows to move and jump Or A and D to move S to Jump Press D multiple times to Climb
tags: Action, Adventure, Arcade, Best, Hot, Hypercasual, Jumping, Stickman
